Speaker 1: Oh here, I think this is us. Yeah.
Monica Geller: Limited seating my ass. Let’s see who made the cut. Hi!
Speaker 3: Hi!
Monica Geller: I’m Monica Geller. Who do you know the bride and groom?
Speaker 3: Oh, I used to work with Frannie.
Monica Geller: Used to work with her. Used to! I’m a relative and I didn’t get invited! A blood relative! Blood!!
Speaker 1: Stop saying, "Blood" to strangers.
Monica Geller: So, how about you huh? How do you know the happy couple?
Speaker 4: We went to college with both of them and now we live next door.
Monica Geller: Okay, you’re fine.
